title: phleum pratense subsp. hubbardii
intro: Phleum pratense subsp. hubbardii, also known as Timothy grass or meadow grass, is a subspecies of the perennial grass species Phleum pratense. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Timothy grass include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and even help with allergies and sinus congestion. Herbal preparations of Phleum pratense subsp. hubbardii can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and extracts, often used to support lung health and alleviate respiratory symptoms.
